notes: Full dinner menu captured including small plates, raw, vegetables, noodles/rice cakes, proteins, sot bap (cast iron rice for two), and desserts. Some items have two prices likely reflecting happy hour vs. regular pricing (e.g., Chicken Wings $14/$20, Coulotte $30/$51, Pork Jowl $26/$41, Black Cod $26/$41); lower price noted as glass_cents equivalent in price_note. Drinks menu not provided in raw text; beverages array is empty.
